metadata.description: Perception-First Design — psychology-backed design framework. 5-layer dependency stack derives requirements from cognitive constraints before proposing solutions.

plugins.name: perception-first-design
plugins.description: Perception-First Design (PFD) — psychology-backed design framework. Auto-activates on design, marketing, copywriting, and communication tasks. Provides /perception-first-design:solve (derive a solution from cognitive constraints) and /perception-first-design:evaluate (corpus-backed audit of an existing artifact). Mode auto-detection routes bare 'pfd this' invocations correctly.
